kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 User Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: User connects to saucedemo with valid credentials and is redirected to home page

test.name: TC_002 Add Product To Cart

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Add To Cart Button For First Product
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Verify Product Is Added To Cart
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Connected user clicks Add to Cart button for a product and cart is updated

test.name: TC_003 Validate Product Sort By Price

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sort Products By Price Low To High
Select Sort Option By Price Low To High
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'class:product_sort_container' by value value:lohi.

NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: value:lohi; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.
kw.status: NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: value:lohi; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: value:lohi; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.status: NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: value:lohi; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

kw.name: Verify Products Are Correctly Sorted By Price
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Connected user selects price sorting option and products are reorganized from lowest to highest price
test.status: NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: value:lohi; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
